creator: barzog@telecom.by
text:
Can't run squidclients on 6.2 and 5.5
root@albatros:~/bin/squeezer2/base>squidclients < access.log.conv > 1.txt
su: /usr/local/bin/squidclients: cannot execute binary file

root@albatros:~/bin/squeezer2/base>file `which squidclients`
/usr/local/bin/squidclients: FreeBSD/i386 compact demand paged dynamically linked executable
